1. **metaXpress** (R/Bioconductor Package).
End-to-end package for bulk RNA-seq meta-analysis integrating QC, differential expression (DESeq2, edgeR, limma-voom), and six meta-analysis approaches (Fisher's, Stouffer's, fixed/random effects).
*GitHub:* <https://github.com/hossainlab/metaXpress>

2. **nf-core-rnaseqmeta** (Nextflow Pipeline).
Reproducible pipeline for bulk RNA-seq meta-analysis across multiple studies with STAR/Salmon alignment, batch correction (ComBat-seq, SVA), and pathway enrichment.
*GitHub:* <https://github.com/hossainlab/nf-core-rnaseqmeta>

3. **Salmon RNA-Seq Quantification Pipeline** (R/Shell Pipeline).
End-to-end bulk RNA-seq quantification pipeline using Salmon and SRA-Tools for ultra-fast transcript-level abundance estimation.
*GitHub:* <https://github.com/hossainlab/salmon-rnaseq>

4. **Single-Cell Analysis Workflow** (Bash, Python, and Workflow).
End-to-end single-cell RNA-seq analysis workflow covering preprocessing, quality control, clustering, and cell type annotation.
*GitHub:* <https://github.com/hossainlab/sc-workflow>
